source: Attack on Titan by Hajime Isayama

active_desires.desire: Ensure the deaths already paid for something real.
Kill Zeke. He made a vow.
Tea. In a clean room. Without anything burning.

blind_spots.soul_belief: My job is to make decisions. Sharing the weight would just add to theirs.
blind_spots.actual_driver: He carries alone because sharing was never possible in childhood and he adapted. The people around him are capable of holding some of this with him. He doesn't let them because he never learned how.

blind_spots.soul_belief: Erwin was already gone. Giving him the serum wouldn't have been saving him.
blind_spots.actual_driver: He is logically correct. He carries Erwin anyway. The logical correctness does nothing to the weight of it. He cannot separate the two.

blind_spots.soul_belief: People die. I move forward. That's how it works.
blind_spots.actual_driver: There is an enormous amount he has not processed. Isabel. Furlan. Petra. Eld. Gunther. Oluo. Erwin. He has moved past all of them by moving forward rather than through. The grief is densely compressed, not gone.
